_coverage.per_instance_clip: clip_zlike/clip_exp keyed file:line#Class#idx via calling-frame self; sites with no self fall back to #agg (labeled)
_coverage.combination_note: combination_preclip is the phase-weighted quadratic form into log() (signed, can be <=0), NOT a bare exponential
NOT_a_phase2_qat_site: CNNStateCorrelator reverse_arg_sum (:1831) / cpwgt_arg_sum (:1856): bare tf.matmul accumulators into tanh (no Dense to wrap). Phase 2 quantizes the tanh OUTPUT (cphi/alpha, analytic I=1); accumulator width is a Phase-4 HLS decision. Deliberate scope.
